name: P & S Check Cashing
description_short: P & S Check Cashing provides check cashing and financial services at a single Jersey City location. Open weekdays 9 AM–6 PM and Saturdays with extended Friday hours.
description_long:
P & S Check Cashing is a traditional check-cashing service located in Jersey City, New Jersey, serving the local community since an unspecified founding date. The business operates from a single physical location at 523 Bergen Ave and can be reached at (201) 984-0320. Like other check-cashing establishments, P & S serves customers who need immediate access to funds without maintaining a bank account or who prefer the convenience of cash transactions over traditional banking channels.

Based on available information, P & S Check Cashing offers core financial services typical of the check-cashing industry, though specific service details beyond the category classification are not detailed in the provided source material. The company maintains consistent operating hours across most days, with extended evening service on Fridays until 7 PM, suggesting accommodation for working customers. Saturday hours indicate accessibility beyond standard weekday banking.

The company's longevity as a standalone, locally-operated check-cashing service in Jersey City distinguishes it from larger national chains. Single-location businesses often provide personalized service and familiarity with regular customers compared to corporate operations. The specific address and phone number indicate a brick-and-mortar presence rather than online-only operation, allowing customers to conduct transactions face-to-face.

Without detailed fee schedules, service menus, or customer reviews available from the source material, a complete assessment of competitive advantages cannot be provided. Consumers considering P & S Check Cashing should inquire directly about fee structures, service offerings beyond basic check cashing, and compare rates with competing providers in the Jersey City area to ensure fair pricing and suitable services for their needs.
pros: Extended Friday hours until 7 PM accommodates working customers
Saturday operating hours provide weekend access
Established brick-and-mortar location at 523 Bergen Ave, Jersey City
Direct phone line (201) 984-0320 for customer inquiries
Consistent weekday hours 9 AM–6 PM Monday through Thursday
cons: Single location limits accessibility for customers outside Jersey City
No website or online presence documented—requires in-person visit or phone contact
Specific fee structure and service menu not publicly disclosed
No information available regarding additional services (wire transfers, money orders, bill payment)
Limited operating hours on Saturday (9 AM–6 PM) compared to Friday
best_for: Jersey City residents needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
Unbanked or underbanked customers preferring cash transactions
Workers seeking extended Friday evening hours for financial services
diagnosis: P & S Check Cashing is best for unbanked or underbanked residents of Jersey City who need same-day cash access to checks without opening a bank account. The main caveat is that detailed service offerings, fee schedules, and competitive rates are not publicly available online, requiring direct phone or in-person contact to make informed decisions.
services: Money orders (presumed based on category classification)
Wire transfers (presumed based on category classification)
Bill payment (presumed based on category classification)
